name: Deepgram
description: AI-powered speech-to-text, text-to-speech, and text intelligence APIs. Sub-300ms transcription with support for 100+ languages, speaker diarization, sentiment analysis, and entity detection.

capabilities.name: transcription_transcribe
capabilities.description: Transcribe pre-recorded audio from a URL or file upload with support for 100+ languages, diarization, punctuation, and sentiment.

capabilities.name: speech_speak
capabilities.description: Convert text to natural-sounding speech audio using multiple voice models.

capabilities.name: text_analyze
capabilities.description: Analyze text for sentiment, entities, topics, intents, and summaries.

capabilities.name: projects_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve a list of all projects associated with the API key.

capabilities.name: projects_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details for a specific project by ID.

capabilities.name: projects_update
capabilities.description: Update the name or settings of a project.

capabilities.name: projects_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a project and all associated resources.

capabilities.name: keys_list
capabilities.description: List all API keys for a project.

capabilities.name: keys_create
capabilities.description: Create a new API key for a project with specified scopes.

capabilities.name: keys_delete
capabilities.description: Delete an API key from a project.

capabilities.name: members_list
capabilities.description: List all members of a project.

capabilities.name: members_remove
capabilities.description: Remove a member from a project.

capabilities.name: usage_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve usage statistics and breakdown for a project within a date range.

capabilities.name: balances_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve billing balance information for a project.

capabilities.name: models_list
capabilities.description: List all available Deepgram AI models.

capabilities.name: models_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve metadata and details for a specific Deepgram model.
